rationale: The indexed union is an operation on the indexed family {A_i} (def:indexed-family), which was missing from the empty set.
notes: Under-specified []. Defined directly by set-builder ({x | exists i, x in A_i}), so no dependency on the binary def:union -- it is the indexed generalization. No nonempty-index restriction needed (unlike 0027), so no def:empty-set.
